title: Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates:
Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates!
